profile.title: My Profile

appointments.title: My Appointment Requests
appointments.subtitle: Track the status of your requests and view aftercare instructions.
appointments.empty_state_text: You do not have any appointment requests yet.

catalog.title: Tattoo Artist Catalog
catalog.subtitle: Find the perfect professional for your next idea and book your session.
catalog.artist_1_bio: Specialist in fine lines, complex geometric designs, and exclusive custom artwork.
catalog.artist_2_bio: Focused on colorful realism and cover-ups, turning ideas into skin paintings.

artist_dashboard.title: Artist Dashboard
artist_dashboard.subtitle: Manage your appointments, billing metrics, and incoming requests.

artist_profile.title: Professional Profile
artist_profile.subtitle: Update your portfolio information, specialties, and business hours.
artist_profile.status_desc_active: Your profile will be listed in the public catalog for clients.
artist_profile.status_desc_inactive: Your profile will be hidden from the public catalog until reactivated.
artist_profile.placeholder_current_password: Confirm your current password to save
